Deal of the Day

DEAL
OF
DAY

Singer Featherweight 221 Sewing Machine

🧵
Estate Sale
Was $220
$95

1950s Singer Featherweight 221 in immaculate condition. Recently serviced and oiled by a local sewing machine repair shop. Comes with original carrying case, 12 bobbins, assorted feet, and the original manual. These machines are legendary for a reason — they sew like a dream.

Available Now
